rationale: This addendum heading and activity summary describes umbrella implementation preparation, not an independent route-level onset. The accepted occurrence fixture already contains 83 source-complete QBNR Phase 1 route occurrences and 38 source-complete Phase 2 route occurrences with exact route, treatment, date, and delivered scope. Linking this coarse summary would add no distinct studyable fact and could create route-treatment cross-products, so this timeline-subject diagnostic is not applicable.
